prompt: A glamorous travel-fashion portrait of a blonde woman seated on a sunlit stone ledge overlooking the caldera in Santorini, Greece, with whitewashed cliffside buildings descending toward a deep blue sea and rugged volcanic islands in the distance. She wears a flowing ivory halter dress with a very deep plunging neckline, side cutouts, a gathered waist with a circular ring detail, and soft pleated fabric draped across her lap. Her hair is long, wavy, and golden blonde, styled loose over her shoulders. Add layered delicate necklaces including a small pendant and a silver cross, plus a bracelet or watch on one wrist. Place a classic white Greek church with a bright blue dome in the upper right background, and frame the right side of the image with vivid magenta pink bougainvillea in full bloom. Lighting is bright Mediterranean midday sun with crisp highlights, soft skin glow, and gentle depth of field that keeps the woman sharp while the background architecture and sea are slightly softened. Composition is vertical, elegant and aspirational, with the woman centered slightly right, torso visible down to the flowing skirt, scenic coastline stretching across the left half of the frame. Add small black text in the top-left corner reading GPT V2. Photorealistic luxury vacation aesthetic, high detail, natural colors, editorial Instagram travel vibe.
